The '''2391st Battle Squadron''' was a task force in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] serving during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Composition==
The task force was known to consist of one [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]], two [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyers]], one [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]], eight [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruisers]] and light [[Cruiser/Legends|cruisers]], one [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|''Ton-Falk''-class escort carrier]], four [[Frigate/Legends|frigates]], and six [[Corvette/Legends|corvettes]].

==History==
Shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the task force was presumed to have been destroyed. However, the 2391st resurfaced a few years later in the [[Kalinda system/Legends|Kalinda system]], supported by the [[6783rd Troop Line]] and the [[1249th Mobile Corps]]. They fought and were defeated by the [[Kalindan Deep Space Fleet]], which pushed them out of the system.
